personal.preferred_title: Senior AWS Data Engineer | Python, SQL, Glue, Redshift & ETL Pipelines

summary: Senior Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise IT experience and strong AWS, Python, SQL, ETL, and observability background. Built scalable data pipelines using S3 landing zones, AWS Glue, Redshift, Python/Pandas, PySpark, and automated validation patterns for enterprise telemetry and forecasting workloads. Strong fit for AWS data engineering roles requiring secure pipeline design, data quality checks, CloudWatch-style monitoring, CI/CD-aware delivery, and collaboration with architects and data teams.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Built and maintained enterprise ETL pipelines in Python/Pandas ingesting P95 telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints, replacing manual reporting workflows with repeatable data processing and validation routines.
Designed hybrid AWS/Oracle data platform using S3 landing zones for raw telemetry, AWS Glue for ETL processing, and Redshift for scalable forecasting and analytics workloads.
Developed PySpark and Python data processing patterns for large-scale telemetry analysis, capacity forecasting, historical retention, and executive reporting.
Created automated data quality and reconciliation checks across ingestion, transformation, and reporting layers to improve trust in operational and forecasting outputs.
Supported monitoring and observability workflows across BMC TrueSight, CA Wily, AppDynamics, and AWS-oriented data pipelines, surfacing pipeline health, trends, and operational risk to stakeholders.
Containerized Python ETL jobs on EC2/ECS and worked with Git, Docker, and CI/CD delivery patterns for repeatable deployment of data engineering components.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Synthetic Monitoring for Brand.com and critical hospitality systems, supporting production observability and performance analysis.
Led the FAST project, mining real-user and synthetic performance metrics to create actionable recommendations for engineering teams.
Upgraded Dynatrace from 6.5 to 7.0 and enforced TLS 1.2 security with zero regression in production monitoring coverage.
Integrated HP Performance Center with Dynatrace to correlate load testing results with application and infrastructure telemetry.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Served as CA APM SME supporting 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents across a large enterprise environment.
Built Perl and Korn Shell automation scripts for performance data extraction, reporting, alerts, and operational dashboards.
Designed standardized dashboards, thresholds, and alerts adopted across client environments for application performance and SLA visibility.
Partnered with J2EE/WebLogic engineering teams to diagnose bottlenecks using telemetry, logs, and application performance data.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster while preserving transaction integrity and performance.
Built C++/OCCI/OCI validation and testing framework to verify migration correctness across millions of transaction records.
Optimized transaction processing and database access patterns, reducing physical hardware footprint by 95% while maintaining sub-second query latency.

experience.title: Developer / Support Engineer (Billing, Interfaces, CSM/PRMS)
bullets: Developed high-availability C/C++/Pro*C/PL/SQL billing interfaces and batch processes supporting telecom-scale invoicing, settlement, and reporting workflows.
Automated WebLogic/WebSphere administration and deployment support using Korn Shell scripting across HPUX, SunOS, and Linux environments.
Delivered performance improvements including 75% memory reduction, 20% throughput improvement, and 10x database performance improvement through SQL and sequence optimization.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Languages: Python, SQL, Shell Scripting, Ksh / Korn Shell, Perl, PL/SQL, C++
skills.AI/ML: Capacity Forecasting, Prophet, scikit-learn, ML-enabled Data Pipelines, GenAI / LLM Agents

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a serverless AWS data platform using S3, Glue, Athena, Bedrock, and PySpark patterns. Focused on secure ingestion, transformation, columnar storage, query optimization, and AI-enabled access to enterprise data.

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built an AI-assisted capacity forecasting engine using Python, PySpark, Prophet, scikit-learn, and Streamlit. Reduced forecasting cycles by 90% and used pipeline-driven telemetry analysis to predict capacity bottlenecks 6 months ahead.

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built a multi-step Python automation pipeline with semantic duplicate detection, LLM-powered scoring and tailoring, JSON artifact generation, document rendering, quality gates, and application tracking. Demonstrates CI/CD-style workflow thinking, structured validation, and agentic pipeline orchestration.
